sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "../../index.css"; const FeatureDetail = ({ title, subtitle, description, benefits, features: featureList, howItWorks, color, icon, gradient }) => { return (
{/* Navigation */}
CyberVault
Features Solutions Pricing
Sign In Get Started
{/* Hero */}
Back to Features

{title}

{subtitle}

{/* Overview */}

Overview

{description}

Key Benefit

{benefits[0]}

{/* Benefits */}

Key Benefits

{benefits.map((benefit, index) => (
{String(index + 1).padStart(2, '0')}

{benefit}

))}
{/* Features List */} {featureList && featureList.length > 0 && (

Features

{featureList.map((feature, index) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
)} {/* How It Works */} {howItWorks && howItWorks.length > 0 && (

How It Works

{howItWorks.map((step, index) => (
{index + 1}

{step.title}

{step.description}

))}
)} {/* CTA */}

Ready to get started?

Start your free 14-day enterprise trial today.

Start Free Trial View Demo
{/* Footer */}
CyberVault

© 2026 CyberVault Security. All rights reserved.

); }; export default FeatureDetail;
